015 * limitations under the License.
016 */
017package org.apache.juneau.http.classic.entity;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.IoUtils.*;
021import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.Shorts.*;
022
023import java.io.*;
024import java.nio.charset.*;
025import java.util.function.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.io.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.http.classic.header.*;
029
030/**
031 * A self contained, repeatable entity that obtains its content from a {@link String}.
032 *
033 * <h5 class='section'>See Also:</h5><ul>
034 *    <li class='link'><a class="doclink" href="https://juneau.apache.org/docs/topics/JuneauRestCommon">juneau-rest-common Basics</a>
035 * </ul>
036 */
037@SuppressWarnings({
038   "java:S115", // Constants use UPPER_snakeCase naming convention
039   "resource", // Resource management handled externally
040})
041public class StringEntity extends BasicHttpEntity {
042
043   // Argument name constants for assertArgNotNull
044   private static final String ARG_out = "out";
045
046   private static final String EMPTY = "";
047   private byte[] byteCache;
048
049   /**
050    * Constructor.
051    */
052   public StringEntity() {}
053
054   /**
055    * Constructor.
056    *
057    * @param contentType The entity content type.
058    * @param content The entity contents.
059    */
060   public StringEntity(ContentType contentType, String content) {
061      super(contentType, content);
062   }
063
064   /**
065    * Copy constructor.
066    *
067    * @param copyFrom The bean being copied.
068    */
069   protected StringEntity(StringEntity copyFrom) {
070      super(copyFrom);
071   }
072
073   @Override /* Overridden from AbstractHttpEntity */
074   public byte[] asBytes() throws IOException {
075      if (isCached() && byteCache == null)
076         byteCache = content().getBytes(getCharset());
077      if (nn(byteCache))
078         return byteCache;
079      return content().getBytes(getCharset());
080   }
081
082   @Override /* Overridden from AbstractHttpEntity */
083   public String asString() throws IOException {
084      return content();
085   }
086
087   @Override
088   public StringEntity copy() {
089      return new StringEntity(this);
090   }
091
092   @Override /* Overridden from HttpEntity */
093   public InputStream getContent() throws IOException {
094      if (isCached())
095         return new ByteArrayInputStream(asBytes());
096      return new ReaderInputStream(new StringReader(content()), getCharset());
097   }
098
099   @Override /* Overridden from HttpEntity */
100   public long getContentLength() {
101      if (isCached())
102         return asSafeBytes().length;
103      long l = super.getContentLength();
104      if (l != -1 || isSupplied())
105         return l;
106      String s = content();
107      if (getCharset() == UTF8)
108         for (var i = 0; i < s.length(); i++)
109            if (s.charAt(i) > 127)
110               return -1;
111      return s.length();
112   }
113
114   @Override /* Overridden from HttpEntity */
115   public boolean isRepeatable() { return true; }
116
117   @Override /* Overridden from HttpEntity */
118   public boolean isStreaming() { return false; }
119
120   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
121   public StringEntity setCached() throws IOException {
122      super.setCached();
123      return this;
124   }
125
126   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
127   public StringEntity setCharset(Charset value) {
128      super.setCharset(value);
129      return this;
130   }
131
132   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
133   public StringEntity setChunked() {
134      super.setChunked();
135      return this;
136   }
137
138   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
139   public StringEntity setChunked(boolean value) {
140      super.setChunked(value);
141      return this;
142   }
143
144   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
145   public StringEntity setContent(Object value) {
146      super.setContent(value);
147      return this;
148   }
149
150   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
151   public StringEntity setContent(Supplier<?> value) {
152      super.setContent(value);
153      return this;
154   }
155
156   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
157   public StringEntity setContentEncoding(ContentEncoding value) {
158      super.setContentEncoding(value);
159      return this;
160   }
161
162   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
163   public StringEntity setContentEncoding(String value) {
164      super.setContentEncoding(value);
165      return this;
166   }
167
168   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
169   public StringEntity setContentLength(long value) {
170      super.setContentLength(value);
171      return this;
172   }
173
174   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
175   public StringEntity setContentType(ContentType value) {
176      super.setContentType(value);
177      return this;
178   }
179
180   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
181   public StringEntity setContentType(String value) {
182      super.setContentType(value);
183      return this;
184   }
185
186   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
187   public StringEntity setMaxLength(int value) {
188      super.setMaxLength(value);
189      return this;
190   }
191
192   @Override /* Overridden from BasicHttpEntity */
193   public StringEntity setUnmodifiable() {
194      super.setUnmodifiable();
195      return this;
196   }
197
198   @Override /* Overridden from HttpEntity */
199   public void writeTo(OutputStream out) throws IOException {
200      assertArgNotNull(ARG_out, out);
201      if (isCached()) {
202         out.write(asBytes());
203      } else {
204         var osw = new OutputStreamWriter(out, getCharset());
205         osw.write(content());
206         osw.flush();
207      }
208   }
209
210   private String content() {
211      return contentOrElse(EMPTY);
212   }
213}
